description: Revel in the comfort of soft fabric with this retro boxer brief from jockey. The superior soft cotton fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered front with a keyhole opening offers maximum support. Crafted from 100% premium combed cotton rib fabric New high tech elasticized cotton waistband for a soft comfortable grip and near seamless feeling Double layered front with keyhole opening Unique leg treatment eliminates the fabric from & ldquo riding up& rdquo Mid rise Fit Wash care Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade
